title: Build Battle Cat Model
description: A resource pack that just replaces cats with the build battle cat
body:
![Stretched image of an unrealistic cat build](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4273efe28dead482610afdf19817085f9291262f_0.webp) ‼️**YOU NEED OPTIFINE OR [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) TO USE THIS PACK**‼️ _**All this pack does is replace vanilla cats to this cat from this video:**_

![Rawsushi logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b85133d42b929476a19e709a2ca9bf0525a97380.png)
